extractText: REFERRAL Referral_0482. Referring provider: Dr. M. Delgado, Meridian General Internal Medicine. Patient: Marcus Delgado, MRN MG-44821. Subject: Cardiology consult for new-onset atrial fibrillation noted on routine ECG. Requesting echocardiogram and rhythm evaluation. Priority: routine. Appointment requested by 2026-06-18. Relevant history: hypertension, no prior cardiac workup. Insurance on file; prior authorization not required for in-network consult.
